title: Add "Ask for updates" as a batch operation

posts.author: royha (roy)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think the batch operations on items could have some more items in them.
The most important addition to be made is to allow batch request for update button.

image1042×85 34.2 KB

This feature will not auto post on all items, auto tag all people in people columns, asking for an update (obviously, without having to click anything else)
wdyt ?
